main.description: A location on the hoop design world — a node of 'the infinite game' that anchors a conversation thread. The rkey is the deterministic place id `<x>-<y>` so collaborators converge on the same place by world coordinate. A place also binds to the foam CHAMBER it sits in (gid + hierarchical address), so it survives genome drift and NPCs can share the address space (see hoop/NAV.md).

glyph.description: Single display glyph drawn on the canvas (e.g. ◆ ⌂ ⚙).

kind.description: Free-form category: hub, system, lore, sandbox, threshold…

x.description: World tile column (the canonical drop coordinate).

y.description: World tile row (the canonical drop coordinate).

summary.description: What this part of the game is for.

addr.description: Hierarchical chamber address (postal.js): a quadtree block path over chunk space + ordinal. Locality-clustered and genome-stable; optional (derived, may be absent on legacy records).

gid.description: Foam chamber id 'cx,cy,i' (world.js FoamField) this place binds to. Optional.

depth.description: Radial layer (foam field depth) the place sits on. 0 = main deck. Optional.
